title: Popol Vuh: The Blood Maiden and the Lords of Death
description: The skull of Hun Hunahpu spits into the hand of the maiden Xquic, conceiving the Hero Twins.
introduction: The skull of Hun Hunahpu spits into the hand of the maiden Xquic, conceiving the Hero Twins.

translation.text: The skull said: 'Stretch out your right hand.' She stretched it out, and the skull spat into her palm.
